title: Notification No.96/2008-Cus(NT), dated 25.07.2008
text: [TO BE PUBLISHED IN THE GAZETTE OF INDIA, EXTRAORDINARY, PART II, SECTION 3, SUB-SECTION (ii) ] GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF FINANCE (DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE) Notification No. 96 / 2008-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 25th July, 2008. 3 Sravana, 1930 Saka. S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Tuticorin, to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on the following adjudicating authorities in column 3 in respect of Show Cause Notices against their names in column 2,- Sr. No. Show Cause Notices No. and Date Adjudicating Authority (1) (2) (3) 1 SCN No. 27/2008 dated 22.02.2008 issued from F.No. INT/DGCEI/CBERU/10/2006 Commissioner of Customs, Export, Nhava Sheva. 2 SCN No. 12/2007 dated 16.08.2007 issued from C.No. VIII/49/OIC/BACC/ XP/DBK/20007 Assistant Commissioner of Customs, Air Cargo Complex, Bangalore. 3 C.No.VIII(10)37/ADC/Adj./CC(P)/WB/2007 dated 24.08.2007 Commissioner of Customs (Preventive), Kolkata, West Bengal. 4 F.No. SIIB/DGCEI/33/07 Cus. Dated 06.09.2007 Commissioner of Customs, Cochin. 5 SCN No. SCN/ADJ/192/2007(SECTION), SCN/ADJ/658/2007 (MAIN) from F.No. INT/DGCEI/CBERU/10/2006/S.Misc. 12/2007-CAU dated 19.09.2007 Commissioner of Customs (Exports), Chennai. 6 SCN No. 208/2007, from C.No. VIII/10/121/2007 Adjn. Dated 26.09.2007 Commissioner of Customs, Tuticorin. -- 1 of 2 -- 7 F.No. S.Misc.57/2007.DBK (Acc) dated 04.10.2007 Assistant Commissioner of Customs (Export and DBK), Air Cargo Complex, Chennai. 8 SCN No. 3/2007-ADC, from C.No. VIII/10/12/2007-Cus. Adjn. Dated 15.11.2007 Additional Commissioner of Customs and Central Excise, Coimbatore. 9 SCN No. 1/2007, from C.No. VIII/23/11/2007/ICD.TPR dated 12.12.2007 Assistant Commissioner of Customs, ICD, Tirupur. for the purpose of adjudicating the above Show Cause Notice pertaining to M/s K.G.Denim Limited, Jadayampalayam, mettupalayam, Tamilnadu - 641 302. (Aseem Kumar) Under Secretary to the Government of India [F.No. 437/46/2008-Cus.IV] -- 2 of 2 --
